title: Cards And Crossbows
description: Just like the Marksman Revolver from ULTRAKILL... but with cards and crossbows.
body:
♠️ About 🏹

Cards and Crossbows introduces a new ranged combat mechanic. Craft cards via the Manic Vessel and throw them around. When a card is hit with an arrow, the arrow will snap towards the nearest target and travel straight to them (It's exactly like ULTRAKILL).

Recipes
